2026-04-21T16:55:22.4944578Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-21T16:55:22.4945177Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T16:55:22.4945614Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T16:55:22.4945985Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T16:55:22.4946293Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T16:55:22.4946541Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T16:55:22.4946707Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-21T16:55:22.4948052Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
